---
title: "Assess the optimal number of starting exceedances"
date: "Compiled at `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', tz = 'UTC')` UTC"
output:
  github_document: default
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
always_allow_html: true
params:
  name: "03_nexceed" # change if you rename file
---

```{r here, message=FALSE}
here::i_am(paste0(params$name, ".Rmd"), uuid = "907ec83f-a14f-4333-abdd-a7b00d861428")
```


```{r directories}
# create or *empty* the target directory, used to write this file's data: 
#projthis::proj_create_dir_target(params$name, clean = TRUE)

# function to get path to target directory: path_target("sample.csv")
path_target <- projthis::proj_path_target(params$name)

# function to get path to previous data: path_source("00-import", "sample.csv")
path_source <- projthis::proj_path_source(params$name)
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  dev = c("png", "cairo_pdf"),
  fig.ext = c("png", "pdf"),
  fig.width = 10, 
  fig.height = 6, 
  dpi = 200,
  fig.path = paste0('figures/', params, "/sim_ttest_nexc_"),
  message = FALSE, 
  warning = FALSE,
  echo = FALSE)
```

```{r packages}
library(conflicted)
library(dplyr); conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter, dplyr::select)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(progressr)
library(future)
library(furrr)
library(readr)
library(rlang) # For global plot theme
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(forcats)

conflicts_prefer(base::intersect, base::unname)
```

```{r}
# Global parameters
cores <- 8
set.seed(123456)
```


## Load permApprox functions

```{r permapprox-load}
proj_path <- rprojroot::find_root(rprojroot::has_file("README.md"))

# Load permApprox functions
permApprox_path <- file.path(proj_path, "functions/permApprox_eps_fct/R")
permApprox_functions <- list.files(permApprox_path, pattern = "\\.R$",
                                   full.names = TRUE)
invisible(sapply(permApprox_functions, source))

# Load epsilon functions
eps_rule_path <- file.path(proj_path, 
                           "functions/permApprox_eps_fct/slls_eps_rule.R")
source(eps_rule_path)
```

## Method registry, file helpers, and per-method runner

```{r helpers}
# Root where generated data are stored
path_data <- path_source("01_data_gen")

path_acc <- file.path(path_data, "sim_accuracy_data")
path_err <- file.path(path_data, "sim_error_data")

stopifnot(dir.exists(path_acc), dir.exists(path_err))

parse_acc_file <- function(fn) {
  # sim_acc_n{n}_d{d}_nperm{nperm}.rds
  m <- stringr::str_match(basename(fn), 
                          "^sim_acc_n(\\d+)_d([0-9.]+)_nperm(\\d+)\\.rds$")
  tibble(n = as.integer(m[,2]),
         d = as.numeric(m[,3]),
         n_perm = as.integer(m[,4]),
         file = fn)
}

list_acc <- function() {
  fs <- list.files(path_acc, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)
  purrr::map_dfr(fs, parse_acc_file) %>% arrange(n, d, n_perm)
}
```

### General method registry

```{r}
# --- General method registry (threshold study) --------------------------------
# Edit here to add/remove methods or change labels/controls.
# Labels must match the plotting color names.
methods_registry <- list(
  ttest = list(
    label  = "t-test",
    engine = "ttest",
    params = list()
  ),

  gpd_100ex = list(
    label  = "GPD(100ex)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "LME",
        tol           = 1e-7,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "support_at_obs",
        thresh_method = "ftr",
        exceed0       = 100,
        exceed0_min   = 0,
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10,
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),

  gpd_250ex = list(
    label  = "GPD(250ex)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "LME",
        tol           = 1e-7,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "support_at_obs",
        thresh_method = "ftr",
        exceed0       = 250,
        exceed0_min   = 0,
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10,
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),

  gpd_01ex = list(
    label  = "GPD(10%ex)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "LME",
        tol           = 1e-7,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "support_at_obs",
        thresh_method = "ftr",
        exceed0       = 0.1,
        exceed0_min   = 0,
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10,
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),

  gpd_025ex = list(
    label  = "GPD(25%ex)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "LME",
        tol           = 1e-7,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "support_at_obs",
        thresh_method = "ftr",
        exceed0       = 0.25,
        exceed0_min   = 0,
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10,
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  ),

  gpd_05ex = list(
    label  = "GPD(50%ex)",
    engine = "gpd",
    params = list(
      gpd_ctrl = make_gpd_ctrl(
        fit_method    = "LME",
        tol           = 1e-7,
        include_obs   = FALSE,
        constraint    = "support_at_obs",
        thresh_method = "ftr",
        exceed0       = 0.5,
        exceed0_min   = 0,
        exceed_min    = 10,
        thresh_step   = 10,
        gof_test      = "ad",
        gof_alpha     = 0.05,
        cores         = 1,
        verbose       = FALSE
      )
    )
  )
)

# Labels (used later for factor order)
method_labels <- vapply(methods_registry, `[[`, "", "label")
```

### Engines

```{r}
.engine_ttest <- function(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, label, 
                          method_key, pi1 = NA_real_) {
  purrr::imap_dfr(lst_panels, function(panel, rep_id) {
    n_test <- nrow(panel)
    stopifnot(ncol(panel) == n_perm + 2)
    colnames(panel) <- c(as.character(seq_len(n_perm)), "tobs", "pttest")
    tibble(
      study    = gsub("^acc_", "", study_str),
      n, d, n_perm, pi1,
      rep      = rep_id,
      test_idx = seq_len(n_test),
      method   = label,
      pval     = as.numeric(panel[, "pttest"]),
      meth_used = NA_character_,
      n_exceed  = NA_integer_
    )
  })
}

.engine_gpd <- function(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, label, 
                        method_key, params, pi1 = NA_real_) {
  
  gpd_ctrl <- params$gpd_ctrl
  purrr::imap_dfr(lst_panels, function(panel, rep_id) {
    n_test <- nrow(panel)
    stopifnot(ncol(panel) == n_perm + 2)
    colnames(panel) <- c(as.character(seq_len(n_perm)), "tobs", "pttest")

    perm_mat <- t(as.matrix(panel[, seq_len(n_perm), drop = FALSE]))  # (B x m)
    tobs_vec <- as.numeric(panel[, "tobs"])

    fit <- compute_p_values(
      obs_stats     = tobs_vec,
      perm_stats    = perm_mat,
      eps_fct       = eps_slls_perm,
      sampsize      = n,
      alternative   = "two_sided",
      method        = "gpd",
      fit_thresh    = 1,
      gpd_ctrl      = gpd_ctrl,
      adjust_method = "none"
    )

    tibble(
      study    = gsub("^acc_", "", study_str),
      n, d, n_perm, pi1,
      rep      = rep_id,
      test_idx = seq_len(n_test),
      method   = label,
      pval     = fit$p_unadjusted,
      meth_used = fit$method_used,
      n_exceed  = fit$gpd_fit$n_exceed
    )
  })
}

# (Other engines like empirical/custom can be added here)

# --- Dispatcher ---------------------------------------------------------------
run_method_engine <- function(method_key, def, lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, 
                              study_str, pi1 = NA_real_) {
  engine <- def$engine
  label  <- def$label
  params <- def$params %||% list()

  switch(engine,
    ttest = .engine_ttest(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, label, 
                          method_key, pi1),
    gpd   = .engine_gpd(lst_panels, n, d, n_perm, study_str, label, 
                        method_key, params, pi1),
    stop(sprintf("Unknown engine: %s", engine))
  )
}
```

### Output path builders

```{r}
path_results <- path_target()

.method_out_file <- function(study_str, method_key, n, d, n_perm, 
                             pi1 = NA_real_) {
  dir.create(file.path(path_results, study_str, method_key), 
             recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  if (is.na(pi1)) {
    file.path(path_results, study_str, method_key,
              sprintf("%s_pvals_%s_n%d_d%.1f_nperm%d.rds", study_str, 
                      method_key, n, d, n_perm))
  } else {
    file.path(path_results, study_str, method_key,
              sprintf("%s_pvals_%s_n%d_d%.1f_nperm%d_pi1%.3f.rds", 
                      study_str, method_key, n, d, n_perm, pi1))
  }
}
```

## Compute p-values and save

```{r accuracy-run, eval=FALSE}
# --- ACCURACY: compute per method, each into its own file ---------------------
acc_grid <- list_acc() %>% filter(n == 100, d == 1)
handlers("txtprogressbar")
plan(multisession, workers = cores)

base_out <- file.path(path_results, "accuracy")
dir.create(base_out, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

with_progress({
  p <- progressor(steps = nrow(acc_grid) * length(methods_registry))

  furrr::future_walk(
    split(acc_grid, seq_len(nrow(acc_grid))),
    function(row) {
      row <- as_tibble(row)
      n      <- row$n[[1]]
      d      <- row$d[[1]]
      n_perm <- row$n_perm[[1]]
      f_in   <- row$file[[1]]
      study_str <- "accuracy"

      lst <- readRDS(f_in)

      purrr::iwalk(methods_registry, function(def, key) {
        f_out <- .method_out_file(study_str, key, n, d, n_perm)
        if (!file.exists(f_out)) {
          res <- run_method_engine(
            method_key = key, def = def,
            lst_panels = lst, n = n, d = d, n_perm = n_perm,
            study_str = study_str
          )
          saveRDS(res, f_out)
        }
        p()
      })
    },
    .options = furrr::furrr_options(seed = TRUE)
  )
})

plan(sequential)
```

## Collect & reshape

```{r accuracy-collect}
# --- Collect all method files for ACCURACY -----------------------------------
acc_method_root <- file.path(path_results, "accuracy")
acc_files <- list.files(acc_method_root, pattern = "\\.rds$", 
                        recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)

acc_res <- purrr::map_dfr(acc_files, readRDS) %>%
  mutate(method = factor(method, levels = unname(method_labels)))

acc_res <- acc_res %>%
  mutate(method = case_when(
    method == "GPD(100ex)" ~ "100",
    method == "GPD(250ex)" ~ "250",
    method == "GPD(10%ex)" ~ "0.1B",
    method == "GPD(25%ex)" ~ "0.25B",
    method == "GPD(50%ex)" ~ "0.5B",
    TRUE ~ method
  ))

# What the plotting/tables expect:
acc_long <- acc_res %>%
  select(study, n, d, n_perm, rep, test_idx, method, pval)

```

```{r}
# Rename method labels
table(acc_long$method)
```

```{r}
acc_long <- acc_long %>%
  mutate(method = case_when(
    method == "GPD(100ex)" ~ "100",
    method == "GPD(250ex)" ~ "250",
    method == "GPD(10%ex)" ~ "0.1B",
    method == "GPD(25%ex)" ~ "0.25B",
    method == "GPD(50%ex)" ~ "0.5B",
    TRUE ~ method
  ))
```


## P-value plots

### Colors

```{r}
# Okabe Ito palette (colorblind-friendly)
okabe_ito_cols <- c("black",   "#E69F00", "#56B4E9", 
                    "#009E73", "#F0E442", "#0072B2",
                    "#D55E00", "#CC79A7", "gray60")

my_cols <- c(
  "t-test" = "#6C6C6C",
  "100"    = "#56B4E9", 
  "250"    = "#0072B2",
  "0.1B"   = "#E69F00",
  "0.25B"  = "#D55E00",
  "0.5B"   = "#CC79A7"
)
```

```{r}
theme_params <- list(
  axis.text.y     = element_text(size = 14),
  axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 12, angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
  axis.title      = element_text(size = 17),
  legend.text     = element_text(size = 17),
  legend.title    = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
  plot.title      = element_text(size = 17),
  strip.text      = element_text(size = 17)
)
```

### Plot function

```{r}
#==========================
# Helper functions
#==========================

# Parse method labels "100", "250", "0.1B", "0.25B", "0.5B"
.parse_exceed_from_label <- function(method, n_perm) {
  m <- as.character(method)
  
  idx_fixed <- grepl("^\\d+$", m)
  idx_frac  <- grepl("^[0-9]*\\.?[0-9]+B$", m)
  
  nex <- rep(NA_integer_, length(m))
  frac_B <- rep(NA_real_, length(m))
  
  if (any(idx_fixed)) {
    nex[idx_fixed] <- as.integer(m[idx_fixed])
    frac_B[idx_fixed] <- nex[idx_fixed] / n_perm[idx_fixed]
  }
  
  if (any(idx_frac)) {
    frac_chr <- sub("B$", "", m[idx_frac])
    frac_B[idx_frac] <- as.numeric(frac_chr)
    nex[idx_frac] <- as.integer(round(frac_B[idx_frac] * n_perm[idx_frac]))
  }
  
  tibble(nex = nex, frac_B = frac_B)
}

# Format fractions like 0.25B, 0.1B, 0.02B, 0.002B
.format_frac_B <- function(x) {
  out <- formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 3)
  out <- sub("0+$", "", out)
  out <- sub("\\.$", "", out)
  paste0(out, "B")
}

# Build label + x position per (n_perm, method)
.build_exceed_labels <- function(df, include_ttest = FALSE) {
  base <- df %>%
    dplyr::distinct(n_perm, method) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(n_perm, method)
  
  meth_base  <- base %>% dplyr::filter(method != "t-test")
  ttest_base <- base %>% dplyr::filter(method == "t-test")
  
  .make_label_expr <- function(n_perm, nex, frac_B) {
    frac_chr <- .format_frac_B(frac_B)
    nex_chr  <- as.character(nex)
    
    if (n_perm == 500 && !is.na(nex) && nex == 250) {
      # Highlight the fixed default for B = 500
      bquote(
        atop(
          bold(.(nex_chr) * "*"),
          "(" * .(frac_chr) * ")"
        )
      )
    } else if (n_perm != 500 && !is.na(frac_B) && abs(frac_B - 0.25) < 1e-8) {
      # Highlight the fractional default for all other B
      bquote(
        atop(
          .(nex),
          bold("(" * .(frac_chr) * ")" * "*")
        )
      )
    } else {
      bquote(
        atop(
          .(nex),
          "(" * .(frac_chr) * ")"
        )
      )
    }
  }
  
  meth_parsed <- if (nrow(meth_base)) {
    dplyr::bind_cols(
      meth_base,
      .parse_exceed_from_label(meth_base$method, meth_base$n_perm)
    ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        frac_label = .format_frac_B(frac_B),
        x_label = paste0(nex, "\n(", frac_label, ")"),
        label_expr = Map(.make_label_expr, n_perm, nex, frac_B),
        ord_key = nex
      )
  } else {
    tibble::tibble(
      n_perm = integer(),
      method = character(),
      nex = integer(),
      frac_B = double(),
      frac_label = character(),
      x_label = character(),
      label_expr = list(),
      ord_key = double()
    )
  }
  
  tt_parsed <- if (include_ttest && nrow(ttest_base)) {
    ttest_base %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        nex = NA_integer_,
        frac_B = NA_real_,
        frac_label = NA_character_,
        x_label = "t-test",
        label_expr = list(as.expression(bquote("t-test"))),
        ord_key = -Inf
      )
  } else {
    tibble::tibble(
      n_perm = integer(),
      method = character(),
      nex = integer(),
      frac_B = double(),
      frac_label = character(),
      x_label = character(),
      label_expr = list(),
      ord_key = double()
    )
  }
  
  lab <- dplyr::bind_rows(tt_parsed, meth_parsed) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(n_perm) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(ord_key, x_label, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      x_key = paste(n_perm, x_label, sep = "::")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()
  
  # Deduplicate x-axis labels per facet, since several methods may share one x position
  lab_axis <- lab %>%
    dplyr::distinct(n_perm, x_key, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(n_perm) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(ord_key, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      x_key = factor(x_key, levels = unique(x_key))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()
  
  # Join factor levels back to full table
  lab <- lab %>%
    dplyr::select(-x_key) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      lab_axis %>% dplyr::select(n_perm, x_label, x_key),
      by = c("n_perm", "x_label")
    )
  
  list(
    full = lab %>% dplyr::select(n_perm, method, x_label, x_key, nex, frac_B, frac_label, label_expr),
    axis = lab_axis %>% dplyr::select(n_perm, x_label, x_key, label_expr)
  )
}

# Pretty log-scale labels
.pretty_log_labels <- function(has_zero, p_floor) {
  function(v) {
    if (has_zero) {
      ifelse(v < p_floor * 1.1, "0", paste0("1e", as.integer(log10(v))))
    } else paste0("1e", as.integer(log10(v)))
  }
}

# Custom facet labeller
.lab_B <- function(n_perm) sprintf("B = %s", n_perm)
.facet_labeller <- as_labeller(function(v) .lab_B(v))

#==========================
# 1) P-VALUE plot
#==========================

plot_permapprox_pval_by_exceed <- function(acc_long,
                                           my_cols,
                                           theme_params = list(),
                                           zero_floor_factor = 1e-3,
                                           y_min = 1e-300,
                                           y_max = 1e+300,
                                           y_step_size = 20,
                                           jitter_width = 0.18,
                                           dodge_width = 0.75,
                                           show_zero_labels = TRUE,
                                           legend_point_size = 2.5) {
  
  df <- acc_long %>%
    filter(method == "t-test" | method %in% setdiff(names(my_cols), "t-test")) %>%
    mutate(method = factor(method, levels = names(my_cols)))
  
  stopifnot(nrow(df) > 0)
  
  lab_obj <- .build_exceed_labels(df, include_ttest = TRUE)
  lab_tbl  <- lab_obj$full
  lab_axis <- lab_obj$axis
  lab_lookup <- setNames(lab_axis$label_expr, lab_axis$x_key)
  
  df <- df %>% left_join(lab_tbl, by = c("n_perm", "method"))
  
  min_nonzero <- suppressWarnings(min(df$pval[df$pval > 0], na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(min_nonzero)) min_nonzero <- 1e-320
  p_floor <- min_nonzero * zero_floor_factor
  has_zero <- any(df$pval == 0, na.rm = TRUE)

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(pval_plot = if_else(pval == 0, p_floor, pval, missing = pval))

  df_points <- df
  df_boxes  <- filter(df, pval > 0)

  zero_counts <- df %>%
    group_by(n_perm, x_key, method) %>%
    summarise(n_zero = sum(pval == 0, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(n_zero > 0)

  base_breaks <- c(1e-2, 10^seq(-20, -300, by = -y_step_size))
  brks <- base_breaks[base_breaks <= y_max & base_breaks >= y_min]
  if (has_zero) brks <- sort(unique(c(p_floor, brks)))

  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = x_key)) +
    facet_wrap(~ n_perm, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1, labeller = .facet_labeller) +
    geom_point(
      data = df_points,
      aes(y = pval_plot, color = method, fill = method),
      size = 0.9, alpha = 0.9,
      position = position_jitterdodge(
        jitter.width = jitter_width,
        dodge.width = dodge_width
      )
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(
      data = df_boxes,
      aes(y = pval_plot, group = interaction(method, x_key)),
      fill = NA, color = "black", width = 0.65,
      outlier.shape = NA,
      position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    {if (show_zero_labels && nrow(zero_counts)) geom_text(
      data = zero_counts,
      aes(
        x = x_key,
        y = if (length(brks)) min(brks) else p_floor,
        label = paste0("0s=", n_zero),
        color = method,
        group = method
      ),
      position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
      vjust = 1.6, size = 3.5,
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      show.legend = FALSE
    )} +
    scale_fill_manual("Method", values = my_cols) +
    scale_color_manual("Method", values = my_cols) +
    scale_y_log10(breaks = brks, labels = .pretty_log_labels(has_zero, p_floor)) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = function(keys) lapply(keys, function(k) lab_lookup[[k]])) +
    labs(
      x = expression(k[0]),
      y = expression(p)
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    do.call(theme, c(theme_params, list(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    ))) +
    guides(
      color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = legend_point_size)),
      fill  = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = legend_point_size))
    )
}

#==========================
# 2) RATIO plot
#==========================

plot_permapprox_ratio_by_exceed <- function(acc_long,
                                            my_cols,
                                            theme_params = list(),
                                            y_min = 1e-300,
                                            y_max = 1e+300,
                                            y_step_size = 20,
                                            jitter_width = 0.18,
                                            dodge_width = 0.75,
                                            legend_point_size = 2.5) {

  df_all <- acc_long %>%
    filter(method == "t-test" | method %in% setdiff(names(my_cols), "t-test")) %>%
    mutate(method = as.character(method))
  
  stopifnot(any(df_all$method == "t-test"),
            any(df_all$method != "t-test"))
  
  lab_obj <- .build_exceed_labels(df_all %>% filter(method != "t-test"))
  lab_tbl <- lab_obj$full
  lab_axis <- lab_obj$axis
  lab_lookup <- setNames(lab_axis$label_expr, lab_axis$x_key)
  
  df_wide <- df_all %>%
    select(n, d, n_perm, rep, test_idx, method, pval) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = method, values_from = pval)

  gpd_methods <- intersect(unique(lab_tbl$method), setdiff(colnames(df_wide), "t-test"))
  if (!length(gpd_methods)) stop("No approximation methods found after reshaping.")

  df_ratio <- df_wide %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(gpd_methods),
      names_to = "method",
      values_to = "p_method"
    ) %>%
    rename(p_ttest = `t-test`) %>%
    filter(p_ttest > 0, p_method > 0) %>%
    mutate(ratio = p_method / p_ttest)

  df_ratio <- df_ratio %>%
    left_join(lab_tbl, by = c("n_perm", "method")) %>%
    mutate(method = factor(method, levels = names(my_cols)))

  base_breaks <- sort(c(10^seq(300, -300, by = -y_step_size), 1))
  brks_r <- base_breaks[base_breaks <= y_max & base_breaks >= y_min]
  lab_plain <- function(v) ifelse(v == 1, "1", paste0("1e", as.integer(log10(v))))

  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = x_key)) +
    facet_wrap(~ n_perm, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1, labeller = .facet_labeller) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linewidth = 0.5, linetype = 2, color = "grey50") +
    geom_point(
      data = df_ratio,
      aes(y = ratio, color = method, fill = method),
      size = 0.9, alpha = 0.9,
      position = position_jitterdodge(
        jitter.width = jitter_width,
        dodge.width = dodge_width
      )
    ) +
    geom_boxplot(
      data = df_ratio,
      aes(y = ratio, group = interaction(method, x_key)),
      fill = NA, color = "black", width = 0.65,
      outlier.shape = NA,
      position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(expression("Number of starting exceedances (" * k[0] * "):"), values = my_cols) +
    scale_color_manual(expression("Number of starting exceedances (" * k[0] * "):"), values = my_cols) +
    scale_y_log10(breaks = brks_r, labels = lab_plain) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = function(keys) lapply(keys, function(k) lab_lookup[[k]])) +
    labs(
      x = expression(k[0]),
      y = expression(p[method] / p[ttest])
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    do.call(theme, c(theme_params, list(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    ))) +
    guides(
      color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = legend_point_size)),
      fill  = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = legend_point_size))
    )
}
```

### P-values

```{r pvals_by_B, fig.width = 14, fig.height = 5, dpi = 200}
# P-values (faceted by n_perm)
plot_permapprox_pval_by_exceed(
  acc_long,
  my_cols = my_cols,
  theme_params = theme_params,
  y_step_size = 10,
  y_min = 1e-40
)
```

### Ratios (approximated vs. t-test)

```{r pval_ratios_by_B, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 5, dpi = 200}
# Ratios vs. t-test (faceted by n_perm)
plot_permapprox_ratio_by_exceed(
  acc_long,
  my_cols = my_cols,
  theme_params = theme_params,
  y_step_size = 5,
  y_min = 1e-30
)
```

## nExceed plots

```{r}
plot_permapprox_nex_boxplot_by_exceed <- function(acc_res,
                                                  my_cols,
                                                  theme_params = list(),
                                                  show_points = TRUE,
                                                  jitter_width = 0.18,
                                                  dodge_width = 0.75,
                                                  legend_point_size = 2.5) {
  
  # Keep only approximation methods (exclude t-test)
  df <- acc_res %>%
    filter(method != "t-test") %>%
    mutate(method = factor(method, levels = names(my_cols)))
  
  stopifnot(nrow(df) > 0, "n_exceed" %in% names(df))
  
  # Build labels (NEW structure!)
  lab_obj  <- .build_exceed_labels(df)
  lab_tbl  <- lab_obj$full
  lab_axis <- lab_obj$axis
  
  lab_lookup <- setNames(lab_axis$label_expr, lab_axis$x_key)
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(method = as.character(method)) %>%
    left_join(
      lab_tbl %>% mutate(method = as.character(method)),
      by = c("n_perm", "method")
    )
  
  # Safety check (helps debugging)
  stopifnot("x_key" %in% colnames(df))
  
  df_points <- df
  df_boxes  <- df
  
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = x_key)) +
    facet_wrap(~ n_perm, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1,
               labeller = .facet_labeller) +
    
    { if (show_points)
        geom_point(
          data = df_points,
          aes(y = n_exceed, color = method, fill = method),
          size = 0.9, alpha = 0.9,
          position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = jitter_width,
            dodge.width  = dodge_width
          )
        )
    } +
    
    geom_boxplot(
      data = df_boxes,
      aes(y = n_exceed, group = interaction(method, x_key)),
      fill = NA, color = "black", width = 0.65,
      outlier.shape = NA,
      position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width),
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    
    scale_fill_manual("Number of starting exceedances (k[0])", values = my_cols) +
    scale_color_manual("Number of starting exceedances (k[0])", values = my_cols) +
    
    scale_x_discrete(
      labels = function(keys) lapply(keys, function(k) lab_lookup[[k]])
    ) +
    
    scale_y_log10(
      breaks = c(50, 100, 250, 500, 1250, 2500, 5000),
      labels = c("50", "100", "250", "500", "1250", "2500", "5000")
    ) +
    
    labs(
      x = expression(k[0]),
      y = "Realized number of exceedances"
    ) +
    
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    do.call(theme, c(theme_params, list(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    ))) +
    
    guides(
      color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = legend_point_size)),
      fill  = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = legend_point_size))
    )
}
```

```{r nexceed_by_B, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 5, dpi = 200}
plot_permapprox_nex_boxplot_by_exceed(
  acc_res,                    # must include columns: method, n_perm, n_exceed
  my_cols = my_cols,
  theme_params = theme_params,
  show_points = TRUE          # set FALSE for boxplots only
)
```


## Files written

These files have been written to the target directory, ```r paste0("data/", params$name)```:

```{r list-files-target}
projthis::proj_dir_info(path_target())
```
